minimaxai/minimax-m2.7.name: minimaxai/minimax-m2.7
minimaxai/minimax-m2.7.description: MiniMax M2.7 via NVIDIA NIM - primary coding model

resonanceSafety: DB 작업 시에는 오직 기존 Docker 컨테이너 재시작, loaddb를 통한 데이터 로드, csql을 통한 쿼리 실행 작업만 수행해야 합니다.
databases.txt 설정 파일이나 데이터베이스 볼륨 구조는 절대로 임의로 편집하거나 변경하지 마십시오.
Docker run 명령어 옵션, 볼륨 마운트 매핑, docker-compose 설정 등을 절대 수정하거나 재생성하지 마십시오.
데이터베이스 삭제(deletedb)나 데이터 디렉토리 강제 삭제 행위를 전면 금지합니다.
Before changing DB, Docker, systemd, or production files, inspect current state and preserve backups.
After DB work, verify ecoinvent_master and emission_material_translation row counts and port 33000 connectivity.
Prefer focused edits. Do not delete data folders unless the user explicitly asks and a current backup exists.
noBuildPageDevelopment: For page development, edit project overlay metadata/assets only: projects/carbonet-frontend/src/main/resources/static/react-app/**, projects/carbonet-assets/static/**, projects/carbonet-backend-metadata/**.
Use /admin/system/build-studio as the SDUI control plane for all screens and assets.
Do not edit frontend/src/**, apps/**, modules/**, release/**, templates/**, deploy/**, or scripts/runtime-configs/** for ordinary page work unless the user explicitly requests runtime/core changes.
Do not run npm build, Maven package, Docker build, image push, or Kubernetes rollout for page-only changes.
Represent screen structure, UI behavior, and menu-page mapping as SDUI/metadata; avoid adding Java controllers or compiled frontend source for page work.
Use ops/scripts/resonance-no-build-apply.sh for overlay/metadata diffs and verify served overlay assets with curl before finishing.
If a requested page feature seems to require code, first redesign it as SDUI metadata or an existing generic runtime API.
Only mark a task build/redeploy-required when it changes runtime engine behavior, security/auth, DB schema, or shared Java contracts.
